policy: Finance owns revenue/VAT definitions; ecommerce owns source transactions; BI owns semantic model.
Posted statutory accounting should come from SAP Business One or SAP BW, not the web scrape.
Website/API/SAP sources -> Fabric Data Factory -> OneLake Bronze -> Silver validated tables -> Gold finance mart -> Power BI.
Use workspace roles, item permissions, RLS by business unit/geography, and least-privilege service principals.
Row counts, duplicate checks, missing SAP document checks, VAT recalc checks, and GL balance checks.
Keep raw source files and close packs for audit retention; keep synthetic demo data clearly labelled.
Mask direct identifiers and separate customer PII from analytical customer keys.
Git-controlled pipeline, SQL, DAX, data-quality rules and documentation; promote through Dev/Test/Prod.
